name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about my hearing claim, did I mess up?
description: Get lawyer now; don't say more.[4]

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about my hearing claim, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get lawyer now; don't say more.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; avoid recorded statements without counsel as they probe for denials.** Request all in writing now. Adjusters minimize claims.[4] Get lawyer to renegotiate. No admissions harm cases.[3] Common mistake; recoverable with appeal.
